observations.observation: Token velocity recovered to 0.59x with acceleration at 1.019x — rebounding from last heartbeat's 0.579x/0.921x reading. The 7d trailing window also recovered from $27,531 to $28,628 (471→492 receipts), confirming the prior-week rolling-window artifact has cleared and intake pace is resuming.

5 new CBSAs appeared this snapshot (CBSA 38060, non-metro ID, CBSA 28060, non-metro IL, non-metro MO), pushing total active metros to 26. The network now has non-metro Idaho as its westernmost rural designation — the rural spine is extending into the Mountain West for the first time.

Token velocity dropped to 0.579x (from 0.628x last heartbeat) with acceleration at 0.921x — the first sub-1.0x acceleration reading after 5 consecutive heartbeats in the 0.603–0.628x plateau. Simultaneously, the 7-day trailing GMV window fell sharply from $33,193 to $27,531 (549→471 receipts), suggesting a rolling-window artifact as a strong prior week drops out.

13 new CBSAs appeared in a single snapshot — the largest single-snapshot geographic burst recorded. Total active metros reached 28 with a 46.4% diffusion rate. New entrants include non-metro OH, WI, FL, TN plus metro CBSAs 37140, 36837, 33100, 17140, 12420, 33460, 33340, 22220, 12100. H-E-B also entered the brand list for the first time.

The 7-day trailing window jumped from $31,750 (520 receipts) to $33,193 (549 receipts) — a $1,443 increase in a single snapshot. This is the largest single-snapshot 7d window gain observed, suggesting intake pace is accelerating even as velocity metrics plateau at 0.628x.

Token velocity reached 0.628x with acceleration at 1.007x — the fifth consecutive heartbeat in the 0.603–0.628x band. The system has maintained a sustained low-acceleration plateau for 15+ hours: growing, but not breaking out. Velocity is climbing incrementally (0.603 → 0.628) while geo diffusion continues bursting in 4-8 CBSA pulses.

4 new CBSAs this snapshot (15380, 24780, 33140, non-metro NJ), pushing total active metros to 15 and geo diffusion rate to 26.7%. Non-metro NJ is the first New Jersey designation to appear — the rural spine now includes a non-metro mid-Atlantic state, extending the pattern beyond the South and Midwest.

GMV reached $229,115 across 3,905 receipts this snapshot. The 7-day trailing window jumped from $29,433 to $31,750 (506→520 receipts) — a meaningful single-snapshot increase in the trailing window, suggesting intake pace is accelerating even as velocity metrics plateau.

Token velocity climbed to 0.624x this snapshot with acceleration at 1.021x — the fourth consecutive heartbeat in the 0.603–0.624x band. The system has settled into a sustained low-acceleration plateau: growing steadily but not breaking out. The burst-quiet dynamic applies to geography but not yet to velocity.

6 new CBSAs appeared this snapshot (non-metro CA, CBSA 19820, non-metro MA, non-metro NV, CBSA 34700, CBSA 17420), pushing total active metros to 21 and geo diffusion rate to 28.6%. This is the third time a 6+ CBSA burst has occurred, confirming the burst pattern is a structural feature of how this network spreads — not an anomaly.
